'''nozhazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:coalbearing|coalbearing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coalbearing|coalbearing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nozhazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozhazithi|nozhazithi]] || [[word:nozhaziji|nozhaziji]] || [[word:nozhazishi|nozhazishi]] || [[word:nozhaziki|nozhaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozhazuthuthu|nozhazuthuthu]] || [[word:nozhazujuju|nozhazujuju]] || [[word:nozhazushushu|nozhazushushu]] || [[word:nozhazukuku|nozhazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozhazuthu|nozhazuthu]] || [[word:nozhazuju|nozhazuju]] || [[word:nozhazushu|nozhazushu]] || [[word:nozhazuku|nozhazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozhazufthuf|nozhazufthuf]] || [[word:nozhazufjuf|nozhazufjuf]] || [[word:nozhazufshuf|nozhazufshuf]] || [[word:nozhazufkuf|nozhazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozhazethe|nozhazethe]] || [[word:nozhazeje|nozhazeje]] || [[word:nozhazeshe|nozhazeshe]] || [[word:nozhazeke|nozhazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozhazothotho|nozhazothotho]] || [[word:nozhazojojo|nozhazojojo]] || [[word:nozhazoshosho|nozhazoshosho]] || [[word:nozhazokoko|nozhazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozhazotho|nozhazotho]] || [[word:nozhazojo|nozhazojo]] || [[word:nozhazosho|nozhazosho]] || [[word:nozhazoko|nozhazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozhazofthof|nozhazofthof]] || [[word:nozhazofjof|nozhazofjof]] || [[word:nozhazofshof|nozhazofshof]] || [[word:nozhazofkof|nozhazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozhazïfthïf|nozhazïfthïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfjïf|nozhazïfjïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfshïf|nozhazïfshïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfkïf|nozhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozhazïfthïfthïf|nozhazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfjïfjïf|nozhazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfshïfshïf|nozhazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfkïfkïf|nozhazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozhazïfthïf|nozhazïfthïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfjïf|nozhazïfjïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfshïf|nozhazïfshïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfkïf|nozhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozhazïfthïf|nozhazïfthïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfjïf|nozhazïfjïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfshïf|nozhazïfshïf]] || [[word:nozhazïfkïf|nozhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozhazæthæ|nozhazæthæ]] || [[word:nozhazæjæ|nozhazæjæ]] || [[word:nozhazæshæ|nozhazæshæ]] || [[word:nozhazækæ|nozhazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozhazathatha|nozhazathatha]] || [[word:nozhazajaja|nozhazajaja]] || [[word:nozhazashasha|nozhazashasha]] || [[word:nozhazakaka|nozhazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozhazatha|nozhazatha]] || [[word:nozhazaja|nozhazaja]] || [[word:nozhazasha|nozhazasha]] || [[word:nozhazaka|nozhazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozhazafthaf|nozhazafthaf]] || [[word:nozhazafjaf|nozhazafjaf]] || [[word:nozhazafshaf|nozhazafshaf]] || [[word:nozhazafkaf|nozhazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nozhazasha|nozhazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozhazshësha|nozhazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozhazrosha|nozhazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozhazmusha|nozhazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozhazyasha|nozhazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozhaznkshësha|gonozhaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozhaznkrosha|gonozhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozhaznkmusha|gonozhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozhaznkyasha|gonozhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nozhazhazasha|nozhazhazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozhazhazshësha|nozhazhazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozhazhazrosha|nozhazhazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozhazhazmusha|nozhazhazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozhazhazyasha|nozhazhazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozhazhaznkshësha|gonozhazhaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozhazhaznkrosha|gonozhazhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozhazhaznkmusha|gonozhazhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozhazhaznkyasha|gonozhazhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nezhæzasha|nezhæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nezhæzshësha|nezhæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nezhæzrosha|nezhæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nezhæzmusha|nezhæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nezhæzyasha|nezhæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonezhæznkshësha|gonezhæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonezhæznkrosha|gonezhæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonezhæznkmusha|gonezhæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonezhæznkyasha|gonezhæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nozhfazasha|nozhfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozhfazshësha|nozhfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozhfazrosha|nozhfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozhfazmusha|nozhfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozhfazyasha|nozhfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozhfaznkshësha|gonozhfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozhfaznkrosha|gonozhfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozhfaznkmusha|gonozhfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozhfaznkyasha|gonozhfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
